<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]]. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu)
***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

-->
==Years of Yang Earth Dragon==
The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Associated years'''
![[1st millennium|1st millenium]]
![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]]
![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 8|8]]
* [[AD 68|68]]
* [[AD 128|128]]
* [[188]]
* [[248]]
* [[308]]
* [[368]]
* [[428]]
* [[488]]
* [[548]]
* [[608]]
* [[668]]
* [[728]]
* [[788]]
* [[848]]
* [[908]]
* [[968]]
|
* [[1028]]
* [[1088]]
* [[1148]]
* [[1208]]
* [[1268]]
* [[1328]]
* [[1388]]
* [[1448]]
* [[1508]]
* [[1568]]
* [[1628]]
* [[1688]]
* [[1748]]
* [[1808]]
* [[1868]]
* [[1928]]
* [[1988]]
|
* [[AD 2048|2048]]
* [[:en:2108|2108]]
* [[22nd century|2168]]
* [[23rd century|2228]]
* [[23rd century|2288]]
* 2348
* 2408
* 2468
* 2528
* 2588
* 2648
* 2708
* 2768
* 2828
* 2888
* 2948
|}

=== Events ===

* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]

*
==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==

* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* {{In title|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊辰]]

{{translated page|ja|戊辰|qq=Yang Earth Dragon|version=84123735|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Drachteen]]
[[de:Yang Earth Dragon]]
[[ja:戊辰]]

[[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]]
[[en:Earth Dragon]]
[[zh:戊辰]]
[[ko:무진 (간지)]]
[[fr:Dragon de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Drache]]

[[af:Aardedraak (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Drachteen]]
[[fr:Dragon de terreboishak]]
[[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Mậu Thìn]]
[[za:Mouzceij]]
[[ar:Yang Earth Dragon]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Earth Dragon--><!--Earth Dragon--><!--Earth Dragon-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-sìng]]
[[hak:Vú-sìn]]
[[nds:Eer-Draken]]
[[za:Fouhsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊辰]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-sìng]]
[[hak:Vú-sìn]]
[[nds:Eer-Draken]]
[[za:Fouhsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊辰]]
<!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Muô-sìng]]
[[hak:Vú-sìn]]
[[nds:Eer-Draken]]
[[za:Fouhsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊辰]]
{{wikidata link|Q118701}}
[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
